memoryArtifacts.headline: A genealogical dictionary of the first settlers of New England showing three generations of those who came before May, 1692 page/279
memoryArtifacts.description:
A genealogical dictionary of the first settlers of New England showing three generations of those who came before May, 1692, on the basis of Farmer's Register
by Savage, James, 1784-1873; Making of America Project; Farmer, John, 1789-1838; Dexter, O. P. (Orrando Perry), 1854-1903

Publication date 1860-62
Topics New England -- Genealogy, United States -- Genealogy
Publisher Boston, Little, Brown and company
Collection cdl; americana
Digitizing sponsor msn
Contributor University of California Libraries

zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Thomas於1664年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可時，她的父親Daniel Thomas20歲，母親Rebecca Thompson13歲。她於1693年4月13日與Henry Tolles II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1727年10月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy Thomas于1664年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可时，她的父亲Daniel Thomas20岁，母亲Rebecca Thompson13岁。她于1693年4月13日与Henry Tolles II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1727年10月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, French, Walloon, Breton, German, Dutch, Flemish, Danish, Greek, West Indian (mainly Haiti and Jamaica), and African (mainly Tanzania and Nigeria): from the personal name Thomas, of Biblical (New Testament) origin, from Aramaic t’ōm’a, a byname meaning ‘twin’. It was borne by one of the disciples of Christ, known for his scepticism about Christ's resurrection (John 20:24–29). The Th- spelling is organic, the initial letter of the name in the Greek New Testament being a theta. The English pronunciation as t rather than th- is the result of French influence from an early date. In Britain, the surname is widely distributed throughout the country, but especially common in Wales and Cornwall. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages (e.g. Assyrian/Chaldean or Arabic Toma and Tuma , Albanian Toma and Thoma , and Slavic surnames listed in 3 below), and their patronymics and other derivatives (e.g. Polish Tomaszewski and Slovenian Tomažič; see Tomazic ). In France, this surname is most common in the Vosges and Brittany. The name Thomas is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Machan , Mammen , and Oommen ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Thomas (see 1 above) as a surname.

Germanized or Americanized form of Polish Tomas , Tomasz, and Tomaś, Sorbian Tomaš (see also 4 below), Croatian Tomaš and Tomas , Slovenian Tomaš and Tomaž, Czech and Slovak Tomáš, all meaning ‘Thomas’.

variants.name: Maas
meanings: Dutch, Flemish, and North German: from a short form of the personal name   Thomas  .

variants.name: Mashak
meanings: Americanized form of Polish Maszak: patronymic from a short form of the personal name Tomasz (see Thomas ) or possibly of a personal name beginning with Ma-. The surname Maszak is very rare in Poland.
In some cases also an Americanized form of Czech Mašek (see Masek ). Compare Mashek .

variants.name: Maschke
meanings: German: from a Slavic-influenced (see below) pet form of the personal names   Thomas   (compare   Maas  ) or   Matthias  .
Germanized form of Sorbian Mašk, Maška, and Maško: from a pet form of the personal name Domaš or Tomaš (see Thomas 3, 4), or of any name beginning with Ma-.
Germanized form of Czech Mašek (see Masek ) and Polish Maszek, both cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Toma
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Kamal, Nabil, Salem, Kamil, Safa, Samir, Adil, Adnan, Aziz, Bahjat, Basem, Bashar.  Japanese Hiroshi, Takeo, Hideo, Isako, Izumi, Junichi, Kenji, Kiyoko, Masakazu, Rikuo, Sachi, Shigeo.
Romanian and Croatian: from the personal name Toma, an equivalent of Thomas . Compare Tomas .

Italian, French, Polish, Slovak, and Hungarian: from a short, pet, or dialect form of a personal name equivalent to Thomas (Italian Tommaso, French Thomas, Polish Tomasz, Slovak Tomáš, Hungarian Tamás).

variants.name: Mask
meanings: English: unexplained.
German: from a pet form of the personal name   Thomas  .

variants.name: Masino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Ciro, Larraine.
Italian: from a short form of Tommasino, a pet form of thepersonal name Tommaso (see Thomas ).

variants.name: Mascio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Gino, Luigi, Paolo, Salvatore.
Italian:
(southern): from a variant of Maso, a short form of the personal name Tommaso (see Thomas ). Alternatively, perhaps from an Italianized form of the Albanian equivalent Mashi.

variants.name: Masel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt.
German: from a pet form of   Thomas  .

variants.name: Masi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Mario, Vito, Carlo, Antonio, Alfonso, Armando, Filomena, Gerardo, Giovanni, Salvatore, Alfonse, Alfonsina, Amato, Anello, Canio, Emilio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of Maso, a short form of the personal name Tommaso (see Thomas ).

variants.name: Masiello
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Rocco, Angelo, Carmine, Franco, Salvatore, Antonio, Carmino, Domenic, Domenica, Francesco, Mauro.
Italian (mainly Naples): from a pet form of the personal name Tommaso (see Thomas ).

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Thomas was born in 1664, in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Daniel Thomas, was 20 and her mother, Rebecca Thompson, was 13. She married Henry Tolles II on 13 April 1693, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 19 October 1727, in New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Thomas est née en 1664, à Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Daniel Thomas, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Thompson, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Tolles II le 13 avril 1693, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 octobre 1727, à New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans.

Lei sposato Henry Tolles II il 13 aprile 1693, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Thomasが1664年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンサイブルークで生まれた時，父Daniel Thomasは20歳，母Rebecca Thompsonは13歳であった。1693年4月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンでHenry Tolles IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1727年10月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンで63歳で死去した。

ko.Old Saybrook, Connecticut Colony, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Thomas(이)가 1664년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Daniel Thomas(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rebecca Thompson(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1693년 4월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 Henry Tolles II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1727년 10월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Thomas nasceu em 1664, em Saybrook, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Daniel Thomas, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Thompson, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Tolles II em 13 de abril de 1693, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de outubro de 1727, em New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Thomas родилась в 1664 г. в местности сеибрук, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Daniel Thomas было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Thompson, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Tolles II 13 апреля 1693 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 19 октября 1727 г. в местности ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dorothy Thomas nació en 1664, en Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Daniel Thomas, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Rebecca Thompson, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Henry Tolles II el 13 de abril de 1693, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 19 de octubre de 1727, en New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años.
